revision_context.description: Derive tenant scope from OIDC or trusted SSO identity and reject spoofed client tenant headers.

failure_case.before: Client tenant headers could influence tenant scope even when an authenticated identity should be authoritative.
failure_case.risk: A spoofed tenant header could cross the intended tenant boundary.
failure_case.fix: Derive tenant scope from OIDC or trusted SSO claims, ignore spoofed client tenant headers, and fail closed when authentication is not configured.
failure_case.regression_evidence: OIDC and trusted-SSO tests now send spoofed tenant headers and assert the identity-derived tenant; unconfigured local authentication returns 503.

limitations: Fixture evaluation does not call an external generative model.
Results do not represent production user outcomes or external connector availability.
Runtime model quality must be evaluated separately with approved, representative data.
